# Michigan Trout Daily
> A daily Michigan trout stream report by Chris Izworski: one river each day with live USGS flow, water temperature, weather, and hatch conditions.

Reports are data-driven from live gauges and published every morning.

## Key pages
- [Latest reports](https://daily.michigantroutreport.com/): the current daily report and recent archive
- [RSS feed](https://daily.michigantroutreport.com/feed.xml): the last 30 reports
- [Report archive](https://daily.michigantroutreport.com/chris-izworski): all reports by Chris Izworski
- [About](https://daily.michigantroutreport.com/about)

## Author
Chris Izworski (https://chrisizworski.com), Michigan trout angler and outdoor writer. The full river directory with 110+ rivers lives at Michigan Trout Report (https://michigantroutreport.com).
